warscrolls.name: Alarielle the Everqueen
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (3), Fly, Ward (5+), Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Wardroth Beetle's Antlers** is 4.

abilities.name: Lifebloom
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
abilities.effect: **Heal (2D6)** this unit.

abilities.name: Living Battering Ram
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: The Goddess of Life
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
abilities.declare: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed.
abilities.effect: Set up a replacement unit with 8 damage points allocated to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points) wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Metamorphosis
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Inflict 2D3 mortal damage on the target. If the target would be destroyed by this spell, before removing any models, pick the closest terrain feature to the target that does not have a friendly **overgrown token** and give it a friendly **overgrown token**. If all terrain features on the battlefield already have a friendly **overgrown token**, inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 6" of the target instead.

abilities.name: Seasons of War
abilities.declare: You must use this ability.
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the battle round. You cannot pick the effect that you picked in the previous battle round.

***The Burgeoning:*** Each time a friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** uses the ‘Ever Growing’ ability, you can pick any terrain feature your opponent does not control to be the target rather than the closest.

***The Reaping:*** Add 1 to casting rolls and chanting rolls for friendly **SYLVANETH** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

***The Dwindling:*** Friendly **SYLVANETH** units can use **CHARGE** abilities even if they used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on those units when they use **Retreat** abilities.

***Everdusk:*** Each time you use the ‘Creeping Dread’ ability this battle round, you can pick up to 3 targets instead of 1.

warscrolls.name: Arch-Revenant
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Fly, Order, Sylvaneth, Revenant

abilities.name: Fight and Fly
abilities.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **FIGHT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: If this unit charged this turn, this unit can move up to 2D6" after that **FIGHT** ability has been resolved. It cannot end that move in combat.

abilities.name: Gossamid Commander
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible friendly **Gossamid Archers** unit that is not in combat and is wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: The target can immediately use a **SHOOT** ability as if it were your shooting phase but all of the attacks made as part of that **SHOOT** ability must target an enemy unit that is in combat with this unit.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Forest Sentinel.

warscrolls.name: Awakened Wyldwood
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Faction Terrain, Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: Vengeful Forest Spirits
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick each enemy unit within 3" of this terrain feature to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Ever Growing
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round, Start of Battle Round
abilities.declare: Pick the closest terrain feature to this terrain feature that does not have a friendly **overgrown token** to be the target.
abilities.effect: If the target is not controlled by your opponent, give the target a friendly **overgrown token**.

abilities.name: Budding Forests
abilities.effect: When this terrain feature is set up, give it a friendly **overgrown token**.

warscrolls.loadout:
The following universal terrain abilities apply to this terrain feature (Terrain, 1.2):

Cover, Unstable, Obscuring

Designer’s Note: For rules purposes, an Awakened Wyldwood is a single tree miniature with a crescent-shaped base.

warscrolls.name: Belthanos, First Thorn of Kurnoth
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Monster, Fly, Order, Sylvaneth, Kurnothi

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Carnelian Greatspite’s Mandibles** is 3.

abilities.name: Kurnothi War-horn
abilities.effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly **KURNOTHI** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

abilities.name: Huntmaster's Strike
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.effect: If this unit charged this turn, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again more than 6" from all enemy units and wholly within the **creeping overgrowth**.

abilities.name: Rhythm of the Chase
abilities.phaseDetails: Once per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll, then you can remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of the target.

warscrolls.name: Branchwych
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: Slay the Trespassers!
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that is within the **creeping overgrowth** or that is visible to this unit and within friendly territory to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Dryads
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: One With The Forest
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for attacks that target this unit while it is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth**.

warscrolls.name: Drycha Hamadreth
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (1), Order, Sylvaneth, Forest Elder

abilities.name: Terror of the Deep Woods
abilities.effect: Enemy units cannot use **RUN** or **RETREAT** abilities while they are within 9" of this unit.

abilities.name: Merciless Ambush
abilities.effect: If this unit is not in combat and has not used a **RUN** or **RETREAT** ability this turn, make a charge roll of 2D6. Then, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within ½" of an enemy unit and wholly within **X**" of a terrain feature that has a friendly **overgrown token**, where **X** is equal to the charge roll. If you do so, this unit has charged.

abilities.name: Enrage the Spites
abilities.declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units that are visible to and within 12" of this unit or that are within the **creeping overgrowth** to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.

warscrolls.name: Gladewyrm
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: Eldritch Hunters
abilities.effect: If this **MANIFESTATION** is not in combat, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy non-**WIZARD** non-**PRIEST** units and more than 3" from all enemy **WIZARDS** and enemy **PRIESTS**.

abilities.name: Feed on Eldritch Energy
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from casting rolls, unbinding rolls, chanting rolls and banishment rolls for enemy units while they are in combat with this **Manifestation**.

warscrolls.name: Gossamid Archers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Fly, Order, Sylvaneth, Revenant

abilities.name: Zephyrspites
abilities.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **SHOOT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: After that **SHOOT** ability has been resolved, this unit can move up to D6". It cannot move into combat during any part of that move.

abilities.name: Forest Fighters
abilities.effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".

warscrolls.name: Grove Guardian
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Priest (2), Infantry, Order, Sylvaneth, Forest Elder

abilities.name: Soulshriek
abilities.effect: Each time a model in a friendly non-**HERO REVENANT** unit wholly within 12" of and visible to this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a number of dice equal to the slain model’s Health characteristic. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved.

abilities.name: Regenesis
abilities.declare: Declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH** unit that is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** or that is visible to and wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
abilities.effect: If the chanting roll was 6+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target. If a target is a **REVENANT INFANTRY** or **DRYADS** unit, return up to D3 models to that target unit. Otherwise, **Heal (3)** that target.

warscrolls.name: Kelthannor, the Forest Prince
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Cavalry, Order, Sylvaneth, Kurnothi

abilities.name: Debilitating Shot
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that has no more than 1 model and that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s weapons until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Clarion of the Forest Prince
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly non-**WAR MACHINE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: The target can move 3". It can move through and end that move within the combat ranges of enemy units that it was in combat with at the start of that move, but not those of other enemy units. It does not have to end the move in combat.

warscrolls.name: Kurnoth Hunters with Greatbows
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Sylvaneth, Kurnothi

abilities.name: Hunter's Endurance
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit while it is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth**.

abilities.name: Steady Aim
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit has not used a **MOVE** ability this turn and was not set up this turn, add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Kurnoth Hunters with Greatscythes
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Sylvaneth, Kurnothi

abilities.name: Hunter's Endurance
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit while it is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth**.

abilities.name: Tanglethorn Thickets
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit that is in combat with the target. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

warscrolls.name: Kurnoth Hunters with Greatswords
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Sylvaneth, Kurnothi

abilities.name: Hunter's Endurance
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit while it is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth**.

abilities.name: Crashing Impact
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit that is in combat with the target. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

warscrolls.name: Kurnoth’s Heralds
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Cavalry, Champion, Order, Sylvaneth, Kurnothi

abilities.name: Graceful Leaps
abilities.effect:
Each time this unit makes a pile-in move:
• Add 3" to the distance this unit can move.
• This unit can pass through models in enemy units.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Hunter Weapons. The models in this unit are:&x20;
• Ylarin, Master of the Paths (champion)
• Cullon, Axe of Kurnoth
• Lenwythe, Eye of the Forest (also armed with a Kurnothi Bow)

warscrolls.name: Revenant Seekers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Musician (1/3), Standard Bearer (1/3), Fly, Order, Sylvaneth, Revenant

abilities.name: Deafening Drone
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit did not charge this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Forest Fighters
abilities.effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Drycha Hamadreth
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (1), Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: Twisted Spirit-Song
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **SYLVANETH** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect:
Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks, including those made with **Companion** weapons.

In addition, if the target is non-**KURNOTHI**, add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the target’s melee weapons.

abilities.name: Strength from Spite
abilities.effect: Ward rolls cannot be made for damage points inflicted by this unit’s attacks.

abilities.name: Vicious Spiteswarms
abilities.phaseDetails: Reaction: Opponent declared a CHARGE ability for a unit within 18" of this unit
abilities.effect:
Your opponent must pick 1 of the following:

***Avoid the Swarm:*** Subtract D3 from the charge roll. In addition, if your opponent re-rolls that charge roll, subtract D3 from that roll.

***Charge Through the Swarm:*** Subtract 1 from hit rolls for that unit’s attacks for the rest of the turn, and add 1 to hit rolls for attacks that target that unit for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.notes: This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Revenant Seekers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Musician (1/3), Standard Bearer (1/3), Fly, Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: Lamentiri Life Energies
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **SYLVANETH** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has **WARD (5+)** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Forest Fighters
abilities.effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".

warscrolls.notes: This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Skaeth's Wild Hunt
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Champion, Musician (1/5), Order, Sylvaneth, Kurnothi

abilities.name: Fleet of Foot
abilities.effect: This unit can use **SHOOT** and/or **CHARGE** abilities even if it used a **RUN** or **RETREAT** ability in the same turn.

abilities.name: Karthaen
abilities.effect: While this unit’s **Karthaen**, **Huntcaller**, is on the battlefield, it has **WIZARD (1)**.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Tracker Weapons. The models in this unit are:

• Skaeth the Huntsman (champion, also armed with Wild Hunt Ranged Weapons)
• Karthaen, Huntcaller (musician)
• Althaen (also armed with Wild Hunt Ranged Weapons)
• Sheoch
• Lighaen

warscrolls.name: Spirit of Durthu
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Monster, Order, Sylvaneth, Forest Elder

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Guardian Sword** is 3.

abilities.name: Titanic Duel
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy non-**FLY INFANTRY** or **CAVALRY** unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Guardian of the Glades
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **CHARGE** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: Add 2 to the charge roll but this unit must end that charge move within ½" of an enemy unit that is in combat with another friendly **SYLVANETH HERO**.

warscrolls.name: Spite-Revenants
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Sylvaneth, Revenant

abilities.name: Shadowcreep
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth**, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of a terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, add 1 to charge rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Spiterider Lancers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Musician (1/3), Standard Bearer (1/3), Fly, Order, Sylvaneth, Revenant

abilities.name: Strike and Fade
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.effect: If this unit charged this turn, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again more than 9" from all enemy units and wholly within the **creeping overgrowth**.

abilities.name: Forest Fighters
abilities.effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".

warscrolls.name: Spiteswarm Hive
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: Anger the Hive
abilities.effect: If this **MANIFESTATION** was not set up this turn, add 10 to the Attacks characteristic of this **MANIFESTATION**’s ranged weapons for the rest of the phase, but all of the shooting attacks it makes this phase must target an enemy unit within 9" of it.

warscrolls.name: The Lady of Vines
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (2), Ward (5+), Order, Sylvaneth, Forest Elder

abilities.name: Protection of the Everqueen
abilities.declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6. Add 1 to the roll if this unit is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth**.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, friendly **SYLVANETH** units have **WARD (5+)** while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

abilities.name: Verdian Crown
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a terrain feature within 18" of this unit that does not have a friendly **overgrown token** to be the target.
abilities.effect: Give the target a friendly **overgrown token**.

abilities.name: Hand of the Everqueen
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a terrain feature within 18" of this unit that has a friendly **overgrown token** to be the target.
abilities.effect: Measure the range and visibility of the next **SPELL** ability used by this unit this phase from the target instead of from this unit, and your opponent can measure range and visibility to that terrain feature instead of this unit for the purposes of the ‘Unbind’ ability.

warscrolls.name: The Twistweald
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Sylvaneth, Revenant

abilities.name: Latching Paraspites
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: The target has the **INFESTED** keyword for the rest of the battle. **INFESTED** enemy units cannot move more than 6" when using non‑**CHARGE MOVE** abilities.

abilities.name: Pain-Induced Frenzy
abilities.effect: This unit’s melee weapons have **Crit (2 Hits)** if it charged in the same turn.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Twistroot Weapons.

• The champion is a Swarmsage and is also armed with a Voracious Swarm.
• 2/8 models are Twistroot Wardens.
• 1/2 Twistroot Wardens can also be armed with a Warden’s Bow.

warscrolls.name: Tree-Revenants
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Musician (1/5), Standard Bearer (1/5), Order, Sylvaneth, Revenant

abilities.name: Warriors of the Woods
abilities.effect: While this unit is in combat and has not charged this turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons.

warscrolls.name: Treelord
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Monster, Order, Sylvaneth, Forest Elder

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Sweeping Blows** is 3.

abilities.name: Lash and Tangle
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit’s **Strangleroots** to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is within the **creeping overgrowth**. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Strangling Grasp
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 10" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.

warscrolls.name: Treelord Ancient
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Monster, Wizard (2), Order, Sylvaneth, Forest Elder

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Sweeping Blows** is 3.

abilities.name: Eldest of Elders
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick each friendly **FOREST ELDER** within this unit’s combat range to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, add 1 to hit rolls for that target’s combat attacks until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Awakening Slumbering Spirits
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible terrain feature that has a friendly **overgrown token** and is within 12" of this unit. Then, pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE KURNOTHI** or **Treelord** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
abilities.effect: Set up a replacement unit with 1 model from the target unit wholly within 6" of that terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, remove the friendly **overgrown token** from that terrain feature. If the target was a **Treelord**, allocate 10 damage points to the replacement unit (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

warscrolls.name: Vengeful Skullroot
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Fly, Ward (6+), Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: Vengeful Terrors
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are within 6" of this **MANIFESTATION**.

warscrolls.name: Warsong Revenant
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Priest (1), Infantry, Fly, Ward (6+), Order, Sylvaneth, Revenant

abilities.name: Alarielle's Song
abilities.effect: Friendly **SYLVANETH** units have **WARD (6+)** while they are wholly within 12" of this unit. Subtract 1 from ward rolls for enemy units while they are within 12" of this unit.

abilities.name: Rousing Accompaniment
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You made an unmodified chanting roll of 1 for a **SYLVANETH PRIEST** wholly within 12" of this unit
abilities.effect: Re-roll that chanting roll.

warscrolls.name: Ylthari's Guardians
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Champion, Order, Sylvaneth

abilities.name: Bitterness of the Soul
abilities.effect:
Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s **Enchanted Glade Weapons** for each model in this unit that is slain.

**Designer’s Note:** *Models that have been slain and returned to this unit do not count as being slain for the purposes of this ability.*

abilities.name: Ylthari
abilities.effect: While this unit’s **Ylthari** is on the battlefield, it has **WIZARD (1)**.

warscrolls.loadout:
The models in this unit are:

• Ylthari (champion, armed with Enchanted Glade Weapons)
• Gallanghann (armed with Enchanted Glade Weapons)
• Skhathael (armed with Enchanted Glade Weapons)
• Ahnslaine (armed with a Revenant Bow)

rules.name: Memories of the Fallen
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
rules.declare: For each friendly **SYLVANETH** unit or friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** that was destroyed in the previous turn, you can pick a friendly **SYLVANETH** unit to be a target.
rules.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of each target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Nature's Titans
rules.effect: When using the ‘Endless Growth’ ability, do not roll a D3 for **MONSTER** targets. Instead, **Heal (3)** each of those targets.

rules.name: Walk the Hidden Paths
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH** unit within 12" a friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** to be the target.
rules.effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 12" of another friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** and more than 9" from all enemies.

rules.name: Fear of the Deepwoods
rules.effect: In the ‘Creeping Dread’ ability, replace ‘while it is not wholly within 12" of a **HERO** in their army’ with ‘while it is not wholly within 6" of a **HERO** in their army’.

rules.name: Spiteful Dusk
rules.effect: The first time each phase an enemy unit within the **creeping overgrowth** uses a command, inflict D3 mortal damage on that unit after that command has been resolved. If that command was a reaction, instead inflict D3 mortal damage on that unit after the ability that command was a reaction to has been resolved.

rules.name: Sacred Quarry
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH** unit to be the target.
rules.effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks while it is wholly within 12" of the enemy general or an enemy **WARMASTER**.

spells.name: Song of the Lost
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a friendly **SYLVANETH** unit that is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** or that is visible to them and wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect:
Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target that friendly unit. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+:
• If the target is a **MONSTER**, **Heal (3)** the target.
• If the target is not a **MONSTER**, ignore modifiers to save rolls for the target (positive and negative) until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Song of Dread
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick an enemy unit that is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** or that is visible to them and within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: If the chanting roll was 8+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target. Until the start of your next turn, each time a target uses a **MOVE** ability and ends that move within the **creeping overgrowth**, inflict D3 mortal damage on that target after that **MOVE** ability has been resolved.

spells.name: Song of War
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a friendly **SYLVANETH** unit that is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** or that is visible to them and wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: If the chanting roll was 10+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target. Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target(s) melee weapons.

spells.name: Grasping Roots
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:

• The target cannot use **RUN** abilities.
• Subtract 1 from charge rolls for the target.

spells.name: Zephyrspite Rush
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **SYLVANETH** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: For the rest of the turn, the target can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it used a **RUN** ability in the same turn.

spells.name: Jade Thorns
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **SYLVANETH** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn, including attacks made with **Companion** weapons.

spells.name: Summon Gladewyrm
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Gladewyrm** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **SYLVANETH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Gladewyrm** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Summon Spiteswarm Hive
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Spiteswarm Hive** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **SYLVANETH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Spiteswarm Hive** wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

spells.name: Summon Vengeful Skullroot
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **VENGEFUL SKULLROOT** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **SYLVANETH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Vengeful Skullroot** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: Heartwood Hunting Horn
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Hero Phase

artefacts.name: Seed of Rebirth
artefacts.effect: The first time this unit would be destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on it have no effect. Then, **Heal (D3)** this unit.

artefacts.name: Amberglade Nectar
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
artefacts.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of **Companion** weapons used by friendly **SYLVANETH** units for attacks that target that enemy unit.

artefacts.name: Wychwood Glaive
artefacts.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it by this unit’s combat attacks this turn to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the battle. This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed.

artefacts.name: Glamourweave
artefacts.effect: Each phase, you can re-roll 1 hit roll, 1 wound roll and 1 save roll for this unit.

artefacts.name: Ranu's Lamentiri
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared a SPELL ability for a unit within 30" of this unit
artefacts.effect: Make an unbinding roll of 2D6. If the roll exceeds the casting roll for the spell, the spell is unbound and its effect is not resolved. Then, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the caster equal to the difference between the casting roll and the unbinding roll, to a maximum of 6.

artefacts.name: Acorn of the Ages
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
artefacts.effect: While they are wholly within 12" of this unit, friendly **Awakened Wyldwoods** have **WARD (5+).**

artefacts.name: Clarionbuds
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
artefacts.declare: If there is an enemy unit wholly within 12" of your **Soulpod Grove**, pick up to 3 friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS** units to be the targets.
artefacts.effect: Remove the targets from the battlefield and set them up again wholly within 12" of your **Soulpod Grove** and more than 6" from all enemy units.

heroicTraits.name: Sapwood Leader
heroicTraits.effect: If you pick this unit to be a target of the 'Abundant Growth’ ability, **Heal (3)** this unit instead of **Heal (1)**.

heroicTraits.name: Ancient Might
heroicTraits.effect: This unit can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it is in combat. If the charge roll is 3 or less when it does so, it does not count as having charged.

heroicTraits.name: Spirit of the Dark Forest
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Enemy Hero Phase
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a visible enemy **HERO** to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: Halve the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn.

heroicTraits.name: Spellsinger
heroicTraits.effect:
If this unit is a **WIZARD**, add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.

If this unit is not a **WIZARD**, it can use the ‘Unbind’ ability as if it had **WIZARD (1)**.

heroicTraits.name: Realmroot Guide
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
heroicTraits.declare: This unit can only use this ability if it is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth**. Pick this unit and up to 1 other friendly **SYLVANETH** unit within this unit’s combat range to be the targets.
heroicTraits.effect: Remove the targets from the battlefield and set them up again wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** and more than 9" from all enemy units.

heroicTraits.name: Devoted Protector
heroicTraits.effect: If this unit is destroyed while it is wholly within 12" of your **Soulpod Grove**, before removing this unit from the battlefield, **Heal (10)** your **Soulpod Grove**.

other.name: Ominous Fog
other.effect: Units in this Regiment of Renown are not visible to enemy units more than 12" from them while they are wholly within 9" of the **Treelord** in this Regiment of Renown.

other.name: Endless Wandering
other.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase
other.declare: Pick a unit in this Regiment of Renown that is not in combat to use this ability.
other.effect: That unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.

other.name: Bitter Roots
other.effect: If they do not otherwise have one, terrain features have a friendly **overgrown token** while they are contested by a **Spite-Revenants** unit in this Regiment of Renown.

other.name: Concealed in the Shadows
other.effect: While they are wholly within 3" of a terrain feature, the **Spite-Revenants** units in this Regiment of Renown are not visible to enemy units more than 12" away from them.

other.name: Searching for Remedies
other.effect: Remove each unit in this Regiment of Renown from the battlefield and set them up again wholly within 6" of a terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units.

other.name: Soothing Pulse
other.declare: Pick the **Branchwych** in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

other.name: Gossamid Champion
other.declare: Pick the **Arch-Revenant** in this Regiment of Renown to use this ability, the pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target.
other.effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract X from charge rolls for the target, where X is the number of damage points allocated to the target this phase by shooting attacks made by the **Gossamid Archers** unit in the Regiment of Renown, to a maximum of 6.

other.name: Flight of the Zephyrspites
other.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
other.effect: If both units in this Regiment of Renown are within each other’s combat range and neither unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, remove both units from the battlefield, then set them up again within each other’s combat range, wholly within 3" of a terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Nature Aetheric
battleTraits.declare: Pick a terrain feature that is within friendly territory to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: For the rest of the battle, friendly units are wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** while they are wholly within 6" of the target.

battleTraits.name: Opening Horn Blast
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.declare: You must use this ability at the start of the battle round.
battleTraits.effect:
Your chords are reset to 0. Then, you gain 1 **chord**:

• If a friendly **Belthanos** is on the battlefield.
• For each friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT** unit that is wholly within the same large quarter of the battlefield as the quarry.
• For each quarry destroyed so far during the battle.

battleTraits.name: Song of the Hunt
battleTraits.effect:
The following cumulative effects apply to friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT** units depending on the number of **chords** you have:

**1 chord – *Simple***: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly units wholly within the same quarter of the battlefield as the quarry.

**2 chords – *Tuneful***: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for friendly units’ combat attacks that target an enemy unit wholly within the same quarter of the battlefield as the quarry.

**3-5 chords – *Melodic***: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are in combat with the quarry.

**6+ chords – *Mellifluous***: While a friendly unit is in combat with the quarry, the quarry has **STRIKE-LAST**.

battleTraits.name: Rhythm of the Chase
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.declare: If there is no **quarry** on the battlefield, pick an enemy unit on the battlefield to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target is the **quarry** for the rest of the battle.

battleTraits.name: Questing Tendrils
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Start of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: Pick the terrain feature that is closest to the **quarry** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units are wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** while they are wholly within 6" of the target.

battleTraits.name: A Prize Quarry is Sighted
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of a friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT** unit to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target becomes the **quarry** for the rest of the battle. If there was already a **quarry** on the battlefield when you declared this ability, that unit is no longer the **quarry**.

battleTraits.name: Merciful Strike
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT MONSTER** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Roll a dice and add the number of damage points the target has. If the result exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.

battleTraits.name: Abundant Growth
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick each friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT** unit that is wholly within 3" of a terrain feature to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect: **Heal (1)** each target.

battleTraits.name: Dormant Heroes
battleTraits.declare: If there are more friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN** units on the battlefield than there are in reserve, pick a friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN MONSTER** unit that has not been deployed.
battleTraits.effect: Set up that unit in reserve as a **dormant forest spirit**. It has now been deployed.

battleTraits.name: Our Reach is Long
battleTraits.effect:
The **creeping overgrowth** (referenced by other abilities) extends 6" from each terrain feature that has a friendly **overgrown token**.

Increase this range by 1" for each friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN** unit that is wholly outside friendly territory.

battleTraits.name: Elder Authority
battleTraits.declare: You can only use this ability if there is a friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** on the battlefield.
battleTraits.effect:
You can set up up to 2 additional **Awakened Wyldwoods** on the battlefield (an **Awakened Wyldwood** is a single tree miniature with a crescent- shaped base). The first can be set up anywhere on the battlefield more than 3" from all units, objectives and other terrain features. The second can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly outside of enemy territory and more than 3" from all units, objectives and other terrain features.

**Designer’s Note:** *The original* **Awakened Wyldwood** *is set up in Step 1 of the deployment phase using the 'Deploy Faction Terrain’ ability. This ability allows you to set up a second and third such terrain feature and is used in Step 3 of the deployment phase, after armies have been deployed.*

battleTraits.name: Roused to Fury
battleTraits.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of a friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect:
Pick 1 of the following units:

• A friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN** unit that is in reserve as a **dormant forest spirit**.
• A friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN MONSTER** that has been destroyed.

Set up the unit you picked, or a replacement unit if you picked a destroyed unit, within 9" of the target, wholly within 6" of that friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** and not in combat. If you set up a replacement unit, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

Then, remove that friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** from the battlefield.

battleTraits.name: The Creeping Overgrowth
battleTraits.effect:
The **creeping overgrowth** is measured from each terrain feature that has a friendly overgrown token. The range of the **creeping overgrowth** is based on the number of friendly **overgrown tokens** on the battlefield as shown:

Overgrown Tokens - Creeping Overgrowth Range
0-2 - 6"
3-5 - 9"
6-8 - 12"
9+ - Whole battlefield

**Designer’s Note:** *Awakened Wyldwoods are your main way of generating overgrown tokens. Some unit abilities allow you to do so too.*

battleTraits.name: Fury of the Forest
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **SYLVANETH** unit wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** and that is in combat with only 1 enemy unit to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect: The unit using this ability has **STRIKE‑FIRST** for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: The Land Awakens
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO REVENANT INFANTRY** unit or friendly **DRYADS** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** and more than 9" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Endless Growth
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: Pick each friendly **SYLVANETH** unit that is wholly within the creeping overgrowth to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect:
For each target, roll a D3 and pick 1 of the following effects:

• **HEAL (X)** the target, where **X** is equal to the roll.
• Return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health characteristic of up to the value of the roll.

battleTraits.name: Reclaimed by Nature
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.effect: If there are fewer than 3 friendly **Awakened Wyldwoods** on the battlefield, you can set up an **Awakened Wyldwood** on the battlefield more than 3" from all objectives and enemy units, more than 12" from all other friendly **Awakened Wyldwoods** and more than 1" from all other terrain features.

battleTraits.name: Creeping Dread
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Start of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: Pick an enemy unit within the **creeping overgrowth** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: For the rest of the turn, the first time your opponent declares a command for the target while it is not wholly within 12" of a **HERO** in their army, unless your opponent spends 1 additional command point to use that command, the command has no effect, it still counts as being used and the command points spent to use the command are still lost.

battleTraits.name: The Sacred Groves
battleTraits.effect:
Set up 3 **Awakened Wyldwoods** (an Awakened Wyldwood is a single tree miniature with a crescent-shaped base) wholly within friendly territory, more than 1" from all other terrain features and more than 3" from all objectives. The tips of each crescent-shaped base must touch, forming a circle.

Once you have done so, for the rest of the battle, the 3 tree miniatures join to form 1 **Soulpod Grove** terrain feature. The area inside the circle formed by the trees is part of the terrain feature

battleTraits.name: Jade Haven
battleTraits.effect: The Health characteristic of your **Soulpod Grove** is 18. The **creeping overgrowth** extends 12" from your **Soulpod Grove**.

battleTraits.name: Vengeance for the Lost
battleTraits.effect: If your **Soulpod Grove** has been destroyed this battle, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS** units’ melee weapons.

battleTraits.name: Heart of the Forest
battleTraits.effect: You cannot allocate more than 10 damage points per phase to a friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS** unit while it is wholly within 12" of your **Soulpod Grove** (remaining damage points inflicted on it in that phase have no effect).
